body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-43644", "cvss": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:A/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "podinfo through 6.11.2 contains a reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability in the /echo and /api/echo endpoints where the echoHandler writes request body content directly to the response without setting explicit Content-Type or X-Content-Type-Options headers. Attackers can craft cross-origin HTML pages with auto-submitting forms containing script payloads in the request body, which are served as text/html due to Go's content type detection, allowing the reflected script to execute in the podinfo origin context when victims visit the attacker's page.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00195, "percentile": 0.09248}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q23m-vm9r-5745", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-20T15:48:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q23m-vm9r-5745", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q23m-vm9r-5745"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43644"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-14T13:16:18Z", "published_at": "2026-05-14T15:31:58Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43644", "https://github.com/stefanprodan/podinfo/issues/474", "https://github.com/Niccolo10/Security-Advisories/blob/main/CVE-2026-43644/cve-2026-43644.md", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/podinfo-reflected-xss-via-echo-endpoint", "https://github.com/stefanprodan/podinfo/pull/480", "https://github.com/stefanprodan/podinfo/commit/cbebb20fd48588d36fc7ff3e874c128eb89692f4", "https://github.com/stefanprodan/podinfo/releases/tag/6.12.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q23m-vm9r-5745"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/stefanprodan/podinfo", "summary": "podinfo: cross-site scripting vulnerability in the /echo and /api/echo endpoints", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-20T15:48:01Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q23m-vm9r-5745", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.8.1-0.20260519111337-cbebb20fd485", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/stefanprodan/podinfo"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.8.1-0.20260519111337-cbebb20fd485"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
